dialog.stepLabel: Devout Acolytes: "How do we lead people to worship You?..."

items.speaker: Devout Acolytes
items.text: How do we lead people to worship You?

items.speaker: Devout Acolytes
items.text: We guide them closer to Your boundless grace.

items.speaker: Devout Acolytes
items.text: How do we lead people to believe in You?

items.speaker: Devout Acolytes
items.text: We let them touch Your very soul.

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: There's an inscription on the altar.

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: "I am no longer Them. I will lead the people forward."

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: Imperator's statue is gone… Is this Fenrico's ambition?

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: "It reminds us that the Sentinel walks with us, illuminating our path with wisdom."

items.speaker: {PlayerName}
items.text: The Sentinel… Could this lantern be the very one Napoli the Second used? The one imbued with the Sentinel's power that allowed him to repel the Dark Tide?
